stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The sign of the figure is located at a distance of 1.5 m from the (1) _____ of the road and applies to (2) _____.

options.b: (1) left side and an additional one at the right side, (2) drivers of vehicles
options.c: (1) left or right side, (2) drivers of vehicles
options.d: (1) left side and an additional one at the right side, (2) aircraft
